Background
 Clark County, Nevada is seeking proposals from qualified firms to develop a comprehensive Placemaking, Branding, and Wayfinding Plan for the Chinatown Overlay District and Koreatown in unincorporated Clark County. 
The goal of this project is to create a cohesive strategy that celebrates the district’s unique Asian heritage while addressing contemporary urban design needs.

Work Detail

opps.title: Information Technology Infrastructure Vendors
opps.summary:
Background
 The E-470 Public Highway Authority, located in Aurora, Colorado, is seeking qualified vendors to fulfill its requirements for information technology (IT) products, services, and software licenses. The Authority operates a user-financed toll highway around the Denver metropolitan area and aims to enhance customer journeys through safety and reliability.

This Request for Qualifications

opps.title: Burial and Memorialization Electronic Directory (BMeD) Commercial Off-the-Shelf Platforms
opps.summary:
Background
 The American Battle Monuments Commission (ABMC) is seeking industry input through this Request for Information (RFI) for market research purposes.
